title: OAMP Knowledge Entry
description: A discrete piece of information an agent has learned about a user, including optional governed-memory metadata and extended provenance.

oamp_version.description: OAMP spec version. Use '1.2.0' when v1.2-only fields are present.

id.description: UUID v4 unique identifier for this knowledge entry.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user this knowledge belongs to.

category.description: Classification of the knowledge: fact (objective info), preference (stated/inferred), pattern (recurring behavior), correction (user corrected agent).

content.description: The knowledge itself, expressed in natural language.

confidence.description: Agent confidence in this knowledge. 0.0 = no confidence, 1.0 = certain.

source.description: Minimal provenance information: where and when this knowledge was acquired.

session_id.description: Identifier of the session where this knowledge was learned.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent that produced this knowledge entry.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this knowledge was learned.

provenance.description: Optional richer lineage metadata for multi-source evidence chains or synthesized memories.

sources.description: Ordered list of source records that contributed to this entry.

derived.description: Whether the entry was synthesized from multiple sources.

governance.description: Optional governed-memory metadata describing sensitivity and handling hints.

labels.description: Optional backend- or tenant-defined governance labels.

decay.description: Temporal decay parameters. If absent, no decay is applied.

half_life_days.description: Half-life in days for confidence decay. null means no decay.

last_confirmed.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this knowledge was last confirmed by user behavior.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and grouping knowledge entries.

metadata.description: Vendor-specific extensions. Compliant implementations must not reject documents with unknown metadata fields.
